positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial forest scene rendered in the Art Deco style mixed with bioluminescent flora and geometric patterns. The main subject is a symmetrical archway framing an abstracted cosmic portal, filled with glowing, crystalline foliage and star-dust particulates. Composition must be central, high-contrast, and designed for fabric printing. Dominant colors are deep indigo, sapphire blue, teal, emerald green, and accents of glowing gold and pearlescent white. Focus on clean silhouettes, crisp line work, and intricate botanical geometry. Studio quality illustration, detailed linework, vector art quality, maximalism, perfect symmetry.
